cases.answer_preview: It is not recommended to use your OMEN laptop on your bed or lap for long gaming sessions. The manuals advise against placing the computer directly on your lap or obstructing the air vents, as this can lead to heat-related injuries or overheating. It is best to use the laptop on a hard, flat surface
